display.purpose: H1 — article titles, hero headings. System serif, weight 700.

headline.purpose: H2 — major section headings with § counter. System serif.

title.purpose: H3 — sub-sections, card titles. System serif.

body.purpose: Article body, UI text. System sans, 1.65 line-height for CJK.

label.purpose: Timestamps, tags, nav items. Sans, weight 500, slightly tracked.

shadows.name: border-rest
shadows.value: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 7%, transparent), 0 1px 2px -1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 8%, transparent), 0 2px 4px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 5%, transparent)
shadows.purpose: Default border-as-shadow on any element with the border class. Resting state.

shadows.name: border-hover
shadows.value: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 12%, transparent), 0 1px 2px -1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 14%, transparent), 0 2px 4px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 8%, transparent)
shadows.purpose: Elevated border-as-shadow on hover — alpha increases for subtle lift.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.value: 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 4%, transparent), 0 4px 12px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 3%, transparent)
shadows.purpose: Card resting shadow — flat, barely-there tonal depth.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.value: 0 4px 16px -2px oklch(from var(--color-accent) l c h / 0.08), 0 1px 4px oklch(from var(--color-accent) l c h / 0.04)
shadows.purpose: Card hover shadow — pairs with translateY(-1px) lift.

shadows.name: glass-nav
shadows.purpose: Liquid-glass nav — dual inner highlights + outer ambient. The only surface that gets this treatment.

motion.name: spring-snug
motion.purpose: Modal / drawer / panel entrance — controlled, no overshoot.

motion.name: spring-bounce
motion.purpose: Nav floating / decorative entrance — slight overshoot for playfulness.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Card hover, grouped entrance — snap in, soft rest.

motion.name: ease-nav
motion.purpose: Nav indicator pill tween — snap in, soft out.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Accent-filled action button. Use once per screen for the primary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: var(--accent); color: var(--contrast); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color 280ms, background-color 280ms, transform 280ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(from var(--accent) l c h / 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Bordered secondary action. Uses border-as-shadow system.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: transparent; color: var(--muted-text); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 7%, transparent), 0 1px 2px -1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 8%, transparent), 0 2px 4px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 5%, transparent); cursor: pointer; transition: color 280ms, background-color 280ms, transform 280ms; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--surface); color: var(--ink); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Minimal text button for toolbars and icon contexts.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: transparent; color: var(--muted-text); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color 280ms, background-color 280ms, transform 280ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--surface); color: var(--ink); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Rose-filled danger action for delete/destroy operations.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: oklch(58% 0.13 28); color: oklch(97% 0.018 50); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color 280ms, background-color 280ms, transform 280ms; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: oklch(from oklch(58% 0.13 28) l c h / 0.9); } .ds-btn-destructive:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-destructive:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Tag Pill
components.description: Rounded metadata pill for categories, tags, and filter indicators.
components.css: .ds-tag-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(from var(--surface) l c h); color: var(--muted-text); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default content container with tonal background, border-as-shadow, and hover lift.
components.html:
Card Title

A short description of this card's content.

Body content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: var(--card); color: var(--ink); border: 1px solid transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 7%, transparent), 0 1px 2px -1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 8%, transparent), 0 2px 4px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 5%, transparent); transition: transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px -2px oklch(from var(--accent) l c h / 0.08), 0 1px 4px oklch(from var(--accent) l c h / 0.04); } .ds-card-header { display: grid; gap: 0.375rem; padding-inline: 1.5rem; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-card-desc { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--muted-text); } .ds-card-content { padding-inline: 1.5rem; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default text field with surface background and border-as-shadow.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; height: 2.25rem; width: 100%; padding: 0 1rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: oklch(from var(--surface) l c h / 0.3); color: var(--ink); font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 7%, transparent), 0 1px 2px -1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 8%, transparent), 0 2px 4px 0 color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 5%, transparent); transition: box-shadow 200ms ease-out; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-text); } .ds-input:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 40%, transparent), 0 1px 2px -1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 8%, transparent); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Range Slider
components.description: Custom-styled range slider with accent-bordered thumb.
components.css: .ds-slider { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; background: transparent; height: 24px; width: 100%; cursor: pointer; } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-runnable-track { height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--surface); } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 18px; height: 18px; margin-top: -6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--page); border: 2px solid var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 12%, transparent); transition: box-shadow 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb:hover { transform: scale(1.12); box-shadow: 0 2px 6px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 16%, transparent), 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent) 15%, transparent); } .ds-slider:focus-visible { outline: none; } .ds-slider:focus-visible::-webkit-slider-thumb { box-shadow: 0 2px 6px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 16%, transparent), 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent) 30%, transparent); } .ds-slider::-moz-range-track { height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--surface); } .ds-slider::-moz-range-thumb { width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--page); border: 2px solid var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 12%, transparent); }

components.name: Nav Indicator Pill
components.description: The sliding glass pill that highlights the active nav item. Liquid-glass treatment.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.125rem; padding: 0.25rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06); backdrop-filter: blur(6px) saturate(1.4); border: 1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / 0.08); box-shadow: inset 0 0 2px 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.55), inset 0 0 10px 4px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.22), 0 6px 24px rgb(17 17 26 / 0.06); } .ds-nav-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2.75rem; padding: 0 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; color: black; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--ring); } .ds-nav-active { background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.28); border: 1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / 0.4); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.6), inset 0 -1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.04), 0 2px 6px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06); }

components.name: Modal Panel
components.description: Elevated modal/dialog panel with backdrop blur and spring entrance.
components.html:
Confirm

Are you sure you want to proceed?
components.css: .ds-modal-backdrop { position: fixed; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 1rem; background: rgb(0 0 0 / 0.45); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); } .ds-modal { width: 100%; max-width: 560px; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 1rem; background: oklch(from var(--card) l c h / 0.6); border: 1px solid transparent; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.25); } .ds-modal-title { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-modal-body { margin: 0 0 1.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--muted-text); } .ds-modal-actions { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 0.75rem; }

narrative.overview:
Like a well-kept personal bookshelf where every object has its place — not a museum, not a showroom, but a lived-in surface that reflects one person's daily reading, writing, and making. The design stays quiet and warm so the content (words, books, photos, fishing logs) can be the voice. Each surface is a shelf in the same room: related, coherent, but with its own small role.

The palette is intentionally low-saturation and high-lightness — paper, sage, mist, blush — four moods of the same quiet room rather than competing accents. Depth comes from tonal layering and a signature border-as-shadow technique rather than heavy drop shadows, keeping the world flat and readable while letting key surfaces (modals, hover states, the glass nav) lift gently when they need attention. Spring-physics motion gives the interface a subtle "alive" quality — the nav pill slides and stretches, panels snap in with a soft settle, cards lift on hover — without ever performing.

Rounded, friendly, everyday: corners are generous (10px default, full pills for tags and nav), touch targets are soft, and the liquid-glass nav bar is the one place the system lets itself be a little magical. The result feels less like "a web app" and more like a personal object you return to.
keyCharacteristics: Four hue themes (paper / sage / mist / blush) share one structural skeleton — only the hue pivot changes
Border-as-shadow: transparent borders replaced with layered box-shadow in color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) N%)
Spring-physics motion (stiffness 320 / damping 32 family) for panels, nav, cards
Editorial serif for headings, CJK-optimized sans for body, decorative Chinese display for branding
Liquid-glass nav as the single expressive surface; everything else stays matte and quiet
OKLCH throughout for perceptually uniform theming and smooth gradients

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Each theme has exactly one chromatic accent. It appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is what gives it weight. Never introduce a second chromatic accent to "make things pop."

rules.name: The Hue-Pivot Rule
rules.body: Switching theme changes only hue — never saturation strategy, never token roles. If you add a fifth theme, pick a new hue and reuse every token's lightness/chroma exactly.

rules.name: The Serif-Is-For-Headings Rule
rules.body: System serif appears only at h1–h6 and the drop cap. Body text, UI, buttons, inputs — always sans.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus) or on genuinely elevated surfaces (modals, drawers, the glass nav).

rules.name: The Glass-Is-The-Exception Rule
rules.body: The liquid-glass nav is the only surface that uses backdrop-filter, SVG color-dispersion, and inner highlights. This technique does not spread to cards, modals, or panels.

dos: Do use semantic Tailwind classes (bg-card, text-muted, border-input) — never hardcode hex/oklch in components
Do keep the accent rare — one primary action per screen, one active nav state
Do use the border-as-shadow system (the border class) for card/input outlines
Do animate with spring physics for panels and nav (stiffness: 320, damping: 32 family)
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — all animations have a :reduce guard
Do use color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) N%) for any shadow that must adapt to both light and dark themes
donts: Don't introduce a second chromatic accent — no blue + orange, no purple + green. One voice per theme
Don't use the liquid-glass technique outside the nav bar — it's the room's one window
Don't add heavy drop shadows to static surfaces — no shadow-lg on resting cards
Don't use decorative Chinese font for anything other than the nav wordmark
Don't use Tailwind's prose prose-slate (it breaks theme switching)
Don't use traffic-light dots on code blocks — explicitly rejected as AI default slop
Don't split the source of truth: tokens live in theme CSS and DESIGN.md frontmatter — don't redefine in component code
